01 — ABOUT

About me

My name is Pranesh Rai, originally from Bhojpur in eastern Nepal and currently based in Kathmandu. I am a passionate Cinematographer, Video Editor, Documentary Filmmaker, Photographer, and Drone/FPV Pilot with over 3 years of professional experience in visual storytelling.

I enjoy capturing authentic moments and transforming them into compelling visual narratives that connect with audiences. For me, the camera is more than just a tool — it is a medium for creativity, expression, and storytelling. Through documentaries, music videos, promotional content, and cinematic productions, I strive to create meaningful and visually engaging content that leaves a lasting impact.

I am deeply interested in exploring different perspectives, emotions, cultures, and stories through filmmaking. With a strong commitment to quality, creativity, and continuous learning, I constantly refine my skills to deliver professional and impactful visual experiences.

04 — SERVICES

Two mediums, one eye

Booked separately or together — most clients end up wanting both once they see the film.
STILL

Photography

Considered, available-light photography for people and brands who want images that hold up over time — not just over a feed.

  • Wedding & event coverage
  • Editorial & portrait sessions
  • Documentary & travel stories
  • Brand & product photography
MOTION

Videography

Handheld, observational films built in the edit, not just the shoot — built around what actually happened, not a shot list followed too closely.

  • Wedding feature films
  • Brand & commercial films
  • Documentary shorts
  • Social & reel-length cuts
05 — PROCESS

How a project runs

01
WEEK 1
Call & scout
I have a real conversation about what the day or the brand actually needs — followed by a site visit or reference pull, not a template questionnaire.
02
SHOOT DAY
On location
I shoot stills and motion in the same pass where possible, so nothing gets restaged for the second camera.
03
WEEK 2–3
First edit
I send a culled photo gallery first, followed by a rough cut of any film work for notes before final color and sound.
04
WEEK 3–4
Delivery
I deliver final, color-graded stills and a finished film, in whatever formats the platform — print, web, or screen — actually needs.
“
MISSION
To create powerful visual stories that inspire, engage, and leave a lasting impression through creativity, authenticity, and cinematic excellence.
